text:
Ezkebel is a soldier appearing in Bahamut, the ninth story of the Attack on Titan Anthology.

Appearance

Ezkebel has dark eyes and freckles on her face. Her red hair is tied in a bun.

Story

Following the lead of Captain Makō Messer, Ezkebel battles a horde of Titans and confirms that she is alive afterwards. As the group heads back to the city, they talk about Titans. Ezkebel theorizes that, basing on Eren's case, some Titans may be within the Walls. As they are talking, they see a lightning and Ezkebel notes that there is no cloud in the sky. They go to where it struck to find a Titan and a civilian. They chase the Titan away and capture the man.
